landing.eyebrow: A calmer path to boarding school
landing.title: Your US school journey, made clear.
landing.subtitle: American Study helps Kazakh students and their families turn a big goal into a step-by-step plan, from the first diagnostic to the final application.
landing.step1Body: See thoughtful matches with a clear percentage and a consultant's reasoning.
landing.step2Body: Follow guided tasks for essays, interviews, documents, and deadlines.
landing.step3Body: Students work independently while parents see progress without chasing updates.
landing.parentPromise: Designed for students, reassuring for parents.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your school journey.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Use the email address invited by your American Study consultant.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: We will send a secure reset link to your email.

update.title: Choose a new password
update.subtitle: Use at least 8 characters, then sign in with your new password.
update.label: New password
update.success: Your password was updated. You can return to sign in.
update.error: The password could not be updated. Open a fresh reset link and try again.

error.title: We could not complete that
error.configuration: The portal is ready, but Supabase credentials have not been connected yet. Add them to your local environment and try again.
error.login: Check your email and password, then try again.
error.signup: We could not create the account. Your consultant may need to confirm the invited email.
error.reset: The reset email could not be sent. Please try again shortly.
error.google: Google sign-in could not start. Check the provider configuration.
error.callback: The secure sign-in callback was missing or invalid.
error.validation: Enter a valid email address and a password of at least 8 characters.

setup.title: Your portal is almost ready
setup.body: Your account is authenticated, but a consultant still needs to assign your portal role. No private data has been opened.

app.lockedDescription: Unlock guided essays, interview practice, document checklists, and consultant calls in one place.

section.title: {section} preview
section.description: This Milestone 1 view confirms responsive navigation and the role-aware app shell. Live student data arrives in the next milestones.

student.title: Good morning, Alex
student.subtitle: One clear place for your schools, tasks, deadlines, and consultant support.
student.progressBody: Three tasks completed this week. Your school-list review is the next checkpoint.
student.cardBody: Curiosity, community leadership, and a strong interest in engineering give your profile a clear story.

parent.title: A clear view of Alex's progress
parent.subtitle: See what is finished, what is overdue, and where a gentle reminder can help.
parent.progressBody: Alex is moving steadily. The next two tasks are planned before the school-list call.
parent.cardBody: Alex completed the interests profile and reviewed the first eight matched schools.

admin.title: Students moving forward
admin.subtitle: A focused view of the pipeline, consultant priorities, and application activity.
admin.progressBody: Most active students are in list building. Two profiles need consultant review today.
admin.cardBody: Three completed diagnostics are ready for preferences, match reasons, and school selection.
